title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Barnabé Monnot - Open Intents in Patagonia
description:
The week before Devconnect, 30 interop builders descended to San Martin de los Andes in Patagonia for three days of hacking on the emerging Open Intents Framework stack. This talk presents the latest updates to Open Intents Framework and a recap of what's been brewing in the mountains.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
